# City Play Co.

> City Play Co. creates live, hosted city games for playful adults in St. Petersburg, Florida.

## Current event

- Name: St. Pete Detective Club: Case No. 001 — The Sea-Vamp Syndicate
- Format: Live detective game and city scavenger hunt through downtown St. Pete
- Date: Friday, July 31, 2026
- Time: Optional arrival from 7 PM; game 8–10 PM Eastern
- Venue: Voodoo Brewing Co., 220 4th St N, St. Petersburg, FL 33701
- Audience: Adults 21+; solo guests, friends, and couples welcome
- Team size: 3–6 players
- Distance: Approximately 1–1.5 miles outdoors
- Capacity: 25 paid guests
- Price: Tickets from $29
- Official page: https://cityplayco.com/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cityplayco/

## Policies

- Event terms: https://cityplayco.com/event-terms.html
- Privacy: https://cityplayco.com/privacy.html

For questions, contact ryan@communityplaytools.com.
